arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the network insights path.

destination.description: The destination resource (such as a subnet or instance) for the network insights path.

destination_arn.description: The ARN of the destination resource.

destination_ip.description: The IP address of the destination for the network path.

destination_port.description: The port number of the destination.

id.description: The unique identifier for the network insights path.

network_insights_path_id.description: The ID of the network insights path.

protocol.description: The protocol used for the network insights path (e.g., TCP, UDP).

source.description: The source resource (such as a subnet or instance) for the network insights path.

source_arn.description: The ARN of the source resource.

source_ip.description: The IP address of the source for the network path.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the network insights path.
